# Ingestion

Load vendor outputs into a SpatialTable / SpatialData path.

**7 registered method(s)** in this category.

| Method | Maturity | Implementation | Summary | Guide |
|--------|----------|----------------|---------|-------|
| `cosmx_reader` | `production` | `native` | Ingest NanoString CosMx SMI output. | [cosmx_reader](../generated/cosmx_reader.md) |
| `merfish_reader` | `production` | `native` | Ingest Vizgen MERFISH output directory. | [merfish_reader](../generated/merfish_reader.md) |
| `merscope_reader` | `production` | `native` | Ingest Vizgen MERSCOPE output. | [merscope_reader](../generated/merscope_reader.md) |
| `slideseq_reader` | `production` | `native` | Ingest Slide-seq V2 puck data. | [slideseq_reader](../generated/slideseq_reader.md) |
| `stereoseq_reader` | `production` | `native` | Ingest Stereo-seq output (requires spatialdata-io). | [stereoseq_reader](../generated/stereoseq_reader.md) |
| `visium_reader` | `production` | `native` | Ingest 10x Visium Space Ranger output directory. | [visium_reader](../generated/visium_reader.md) |
| `xenium_reader` | `production` | `native` | Ingest 10x Xenium output directory. | [xenium_reader](../generated/xenium_reader.md) |
